title: TNSSG's Rubber Duck Mod
description: Welcome the Rubber Ducky to your world!
body:
Have you ever been wandering around a world and thought to yourself that something was missing? I present to you, the Rubber Duck. This iconic yellow cutie will make even the worst situation better. Right click it to hear it squeak. Duck your friends, duck the villigers, duck a creeper, duck yourself.

This mod adds rubber trees, rubber ingots, rubber tools, rubber armor, rubber block and of course, the rubber duck. 

Video: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mhoTZ7FNoqw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
